flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Freed-Hardeman University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Freed-Hardeman University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Freed-Hardeman University fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($25.1k → $21.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Freed-Hardeman University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (57.5% → 64.1%).
